ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the entity in the knowledge base */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Person, Place, Organization) */,
  "support_score" INTEGER /* Support score indicating the confidence level of the entity recognition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_status" TEXT /* Status of the entity (e.g., active, deprecated, pending review) */,
  "entity_source" TEXT /* Source of the entity data (e.g., DBpedia, custom, user-defined) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the entity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the entity */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES entity_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID (for hierarchical types) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the entity type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the entity type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the entity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "doc_language" TEXT /* Language of the document */,
  "doc_source" TEXT /* Source of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "doc_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "doc_length" INTEGER /* Length of the document in words */,
  "doc_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords extracted from the document */,
  "doc_reading_time" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time of the document */,
  "doc_last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification time of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the document */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the sentence belongs to */,
  "sentence_text" TEXT /* Text of the sentence */,
  "sentence_index" INTEGER /* Index of the sentence within the document */,
  "paragraph_index" INTEGER /* Index of the paragraph within the document */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the document (if applicable) */,
  "sentence_status" TEXT /* Status of the sentence (e.g., reviewed, pending review) */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence in words */,
  "sentence_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis score of the sentence (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentence_reading_time" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time of the sentence */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the sentence */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sentence */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity mention */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence where the entity is mentioned */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recognized entity */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the entity mention within the sentence */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the mention and the entity */,
  "percentage_of_second_rank" REAL /* Percentage of the second rank in the similarity score */,
  "mention_status" TEXT /* Status of the mention (e.g., confirmed, pending review) */,
  "mention_source" TEXT /* Source of the mention (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the mention */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the mention */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_mentions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_mentions_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the document */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the access log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the document category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the category mapping */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category mapping */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_map_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_status" TEXT /* Status of the tag (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the tag */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Text of the summary */,
  "summary_length" INTEGER /* Length of the summary in words */,
  "generation_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the summary */,
  "summary_status" TEXT /* Status of the summary (e.g., generated, reviewed, confirmed) */,
  "summary_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the summary */,
  "summary_method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method used to generate the summary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the summary */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the summary */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_summaries_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
